content.text: i don't have a saturday class saved for Mira anywhere in her profile or activity history — nothing in my memory, the village discovery results, or the recent episodes points to a specific saturday enrollment. the parent-and-tot swim class does show up in her recent activity log, but there's no day or enrollment detail attached to it. if you can tell me the class name or where it's held, i'm happy to save that so it's easy to pull up next time.
